label: Public read
description: Anonymous HTTPS / object-storage GET; no authentication required.

label: Public read (no egress charges)
description: Anonymous read with the data provider absorbing egress costs (NOAA Open Data, NASA Earthdata Cloud).

label: Requester pays
description: Anonymous read enabled but the requester's AWS / GCS account pays egress (USGS Landsat 3DEP, NOAA NEXRAD, NEON archive bucket).

label: Registered users only
description: Free account / Earthdata Login required; programmatic access via token.

label: License required
description: Click-through license or DUA must be accepted; download requires acknowledgement.

label: API-key required
description: Per-user or per-project API key (NSF Award Search keyless, but USDA NASS Quick Stats requires).

label: Embargoed
description: Embargoed for a fixed period after collection (typical NEON 1–2 yr embargo, NCEI X-yr ocean obs embargo).

label: Restricted access
description: Restricted to authenticated collaborators / consortium members.
